title: 我正在...
prompt_en: Practice present continuous for actions happening right now.
prompt_zh: 练习现在进行时表达此刻正在做的动作。
description: 掌握am/is/are + doing结构，与一般现在时对比。
knowledge_points: 现在进行时 am doing is doing 此刻
teaching_markdown:
## 现在进行时结构
- **am/is/are + 动词-ing**：I'm eating. / She's reading. / They're sleeping.
- 表示**此刻正在发生**的动作，不是习惯。

## 时间标志词
- right now (此刻) / at the moment (这会儿) / currently (目前)
- Look! / Listen! 开头常暗示进行时

## 与一般现在时对比
- 一般现在时：I eat breakfast at 7 every day. (习惯)
- 现在进行时：I'm eating breakfast right now. (此刻)

## 常见错误
- ❌ I eating now. → ✅ I'm eating now. (必须有be动词)
- ❌ I'm eat now. → ✅ I'm eating now. (动词要加-ing)

title: 他/她正在...
prompt_zh: 练习第三人称现在进行时：He's / She's doing。
description: 掌握第三人称现在进行时否定和疑问形式。
knowledge_points: 正在进行 he is she is 进行时
teaching_markdown:
## 第三人称进行时
- **He is / She is / It is + 动词-ing**
- 否定：He isn't working. / She's not sleeping.
- 疑问：Is he working? — Yes, he is. / No, he isn't.

## 常用进行时动词
- wearing (穿着)、carrying (拿着)、looking for (在找)
- sitting (坐着)、standing (站着)、waiting (在等)

## 与第一人称的区别
| 人称 | be动词 | 例句 |
|------|--------|------|
| I | am | I'm reading. |
| He/She | is | He's reading. |
| They | are | They're reading. |

## 常见错误
- ❌ He running. → ✅ He's running.
- ❌ She is sit. → ✅ She is sitting.

title: 平时vs今天
prompt_en: Practice contrast between simple present and present continuous.
prompt_zh: 练习一般现在时vs现在进行时的对比表达。
description: 掌握习惯和临时情况的时态区分。
knowledge_points: 时态对比 现在时 进行时 习惯 临时
teaching_markdown:
## 习惯 vs 此刻的核心区别
- **一般现在时** = 习惯、常规、总是这样
- **现在进行时** = 此刻临时发生、今天例外

## 对比标志词
- 习惯：usually / normally / generally / every day / always
- 临时：today / right now / at the moment / this week

## 典型对比句型
- I usually walk to work, but today I'm driving.
- Normally he drinks tea, but right now he's drinking coffee.

## 常见表达
- still (仍然)：I'm still working. (还在做)
- anymore (再也不)：I don't live there anymore.
- for now (暂时)：I'm staying here for now.
- temporary (临时的)：It's just temporary.

title: 此刻状态
prompt_en: Practice describing current situations with present continuous.
prompt_zh: 练习用现在进行时描述当前场景和状态。
description: 掌握进行时描述天气/人群/当下情况。
knowledge_points: 描述 进行时 此刻 场景
teaching_markdown:
## 用进行时+形容词描述当前状态
- I'm busy at the moment. (此刻很忙)
- Are you free tonight? (今晚有空吗？)
- She's not available right now. (她现在没空)

## 状态问答
- Are you ready? — Yes, ready. / Not yet.
- Is he available? — No, he's busy.
- What are you doing tonight? — Nothing special.

## 未来安排（进行时表将来）
- I'm visiting my parents this weekend. (已计划好)
- She's starting a new job next week.
- 此时进行时不是"正在做"，而是"计划要做"

## 常见修饰词
- almost (几乎)：I'm almost done.
- just (刚刚/正要)：I'm just leaving.
- right now / at the moment / tonight / this weekend

title: 频率表达
prompt_en: Practice frequency adverbs with simple present.
prompt_zh: 练习频率副词与一般现在时搭配。
knowledge_points: 频率副词 always usually sometimes never
teaching_markdown:
## 频率副词光谱 (高→低)
| 频率 | 副词/短语 | 含义 |
|------|-----------|------|
| 100% | every single day, all the time | 每天/一直 |
| 80% | most of the time | 大多数时候 |
| 50% | from time to time, not often | 偶尔/不常 |
| 30% | once a week, twice a month | 每周一次/每月两次 |
| 10% | rarely | 很少 |
| 1% | hardly ever | 几乎从不 |

## 频率问答
- How often do you exercise? — Once a week.
- How often do you travel? — Rarely.

## 位置规则
- 频率副词放在**动词前**：I rarely eat fast food.
- 频率短语放在**句尾**：I exercise once a week.

## 常见错误
- ❌ I exercise one time a week. → ✅ once a week
- ❌ I rarely don't eat meat. → ✅ I rarely eat meat.

title: 综合运用
prompt_en: Practice switching between present simple and continuous.
prompt_zh: 练习在叙述中自然切换现在时和进行时。
description: 掌握两种时态在真实交流中的切换。
knowledge_points: 时态切换 综合 叙事 描述
teaching_markdown:
## 两种时态的自由切换
在真实对话中，**习惯**用一般现在时，**此刻/临时**用现在进行时。

## 典型叙事模式
1. 描述背景习惯：I usually get up at 7.
2. 切换到此刻例外：But today I'm getting up at 8.
3. 观察与描述：I notice it's raining outside.

## 描述场景的高频词
- describe (描述)：Can you describe what you see?
- notice (注意到)：I notice you're wearing a new shirt.
- happen (发生)：What is happening here?
- switch (切换)：Let's switch to another topic.
- detail (细节)：Tell me more in detail.

## 实用技巧
- 先想"这是习惯还是此刻？"再选时态
- 用 still / anymore / right now 等词提示时态切换
- Look! / Listen! 后必用进行时
